---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for MailTub
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it clearly.  
Example: _"I often need to … but currently …"_

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you prefer your proposal.

## Use case

Who benefits from this feature and how? (e.g. self-hosters, API users, CLI users)

## Additional context

Mockups, references to other tools, or any other context that would help implementation.
